note: Recipe-only suite. Each case probes a paragraphs-specific, load-bearing fact (entity type + bundle model, the ERR field/widget that hosts paragraphs, the bundled submodules, config keys, and permission machine names) that an agent would otherwise have to read module source to answer. Graded on response content; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with the Paragraphs module, I want to let editors add paragraph components to a content type. Which field type do I add to the node, what target entity type does it reference, and which widget do I pick on the form display?
evals.expected_output: Add an Entity Reference Revisions field whose target type is Paragraph, then choose the Paragraphs (stable) widget on the host's form display.

evals.prompt: In Paragraphs, what is the relationship between a 'Paragraphs type' and a 'paragraph'? Name the entity type of each and the class of the type entity.
evals.expected_output: A Paragraphs type (config entity paragraphs_type, class Drupal\paragraphs\Entity\ParagraphsType) is the bundle for paragraph content entities (Drupal\paragraphs\Entity\Paragraph).

evals.prompt: In PHP on a Drupal 11 site, create a paragraph of type 'text' with a field value and attach it to a node's paragraphs field, then persist it. Show the code.
evals.expected_output: Paragraph::create(['type' => 'text', ...])->save(), then $node->field_content->appendItem($paragraph) and $node->save() so the paragraph revision is pinned to the host revision.

evals.prompt: Paragraphs ships two field widgets. Give the machine name of the modern default/recommended widget and the machine name of the legacy/classic one.
evals.expected_output: The default is the stable 'paragraphs' widget (ParagraphsWidget); the legacy/classic widget is 'entity_reference_paragraphs' (InlineParagraphsWidget).

evals.prompt: The main Paragraphs module has no per-paragraph-type create/edit/delete permissions. Which bundled submodule do I enable to get per-type CRUD access control?
evals.expected_output: Enable the paragraphs_type_permissions submodule for per-type create/edit/delete permissions.

evals.prompt: I want editors to author one paragraph once and reuse the same paragraph across many pages in Paragraphs. Which bundled submodule provides that?
evals.expected_output: The paragraphs_library submodule provides the reusable Paragraphs Library.

evals.prompt: In Paragraphs, which permission lets a role see unpublished paragraphs, and which config flag in paragraphs.settings must be enabled for it to take effect?
evals.expected_output: The 'view unpublished paragraphs' permission, effective only when the paragraphs.settings 'show_unpublished' boolean is TRUE.

evals.prompt: On an Entity Reference Revisions field for paragraphs, which reference-setting key restricts which paragraph types an editor may add, and which key sets the paragraph type pre-added when the form opens?
evals.expected_output: target_bundles limits the allowed paragraph types (ordered via target_bundles_drag_drop); default_paragraph_type sets the type auto-added on new host entities.
